mapper.sql: id, owner_id, name, description, objective, config_json, version, archived, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO simulation_scenario (owner_id, name, description, objective, config_json) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{objective}, CAST(#{configJson} AS JSON))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simulation_scenario WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND archived = 0
